name: Zoho Desk → Google Sheets + Drive Archive (Daily Sync)

nodes.name: ⏰ Daily Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every day at midnight. Change 'hoursInterval' to run more often.

nodes.name: 📥 Fetch Yesterday Tickets
nodes.notes: Fetches tickets created yesterday. Pagination handled by the 'Loop' node below.

nodes.name: 🔧 Transform Tickets
nodes.notes: Cleans and flattens the Zoho API response into flat rows.

nodes.name: 📊 Write to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends new tickets. Uses ticket_id as dedup key so re-runs don't create duplicates.

nodes.name: 📅 Set Archive Cutoff
nodes.notes: Calculates the 12-month cutoff date. Rows older than this will be archived to Drive.

nodes.name: 📤 Read Old Rows
nodes.notes: Reads rows from Sheets that are older than 12 months. These will be archived.

nodes.name: ❓ Any Old Rows?
nodes.notes: Only proceeds to archive if there are rows older than 12 months.

nodes.name: 📦 Build Archive CSV
nodes.notes: Converts old rows to CSV. Python script will convert this to Parquet on your machine.

nodes.name: ☁️ Upload to Drive
nodes.notes: Saves the old data as a CSV to your archive folder in Drive. Python converts to Parquet.

nodes.name: 🗑️ Remove Archived Rows
nodes.notes: Deletes rows from Sheets AFTER confirming upload to Drive succeeded.

_instructions.step1: In n8n → Credentials: Add 'Zoho OAuth2' and 'Google Sheets OAuth2' credentials
_instructions.step2: Set the 3 variables above in n8n → Settings → Variables
_instructions.step3: Import this JSON via n8n → Workflows → Import from file
_instructions.step4: Run manually once to test, then activate the schedule
